title: Infantry School FC Ladies Team recruiting players
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Infantry School FC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Infantry School FC Ladies Team in Oudtshoorn is looking for passionate and talented girls and women to join their soccer family!","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Infantry School FC Ladies Team in Oudtshoorn is looking for passionate and talented girls and women to join their soccer family!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They have open spots for players aged 7 to 17, as well as for senior players aged 18 and older."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Desiree Malewa, chairperson of the Infantry Soccer Teams, encourages more young girls and women to get involved, saying, \"We still need ladies, and registration is open. If you're interested, come join us during practice.\"","html":"Desiree Malewa, chairperson of the Infantry Soccer Teams, encourages more young girls and women to get involved, saying, \"We still need ladies, and registration is open. If you're interested, come join us during practice.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Practices are held every Wednesday, Thursday and Friday from 16:00 to 18:00.","html":"Practices are held every Wednesday, Thursday and Friday from 16:00 to 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you're a beginner or have experience, this is a great chance to train, improve and be part of a supportive and enthusiastic soccer team.","html":"Whether you're a beginner or have experience, this is a great chance to train, improve and be part of a supportive and enthusiastic soccer team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you'd like to join, contact coach Nondumiso Ngwaopi at 082 531 7082","html":"If you'd like to join, contact coach Nondumiso Ngwaopi at 082 531 7082"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Infantry School FC Ladies Team recruiting players
